name: cicd
description: Unified CI/CD troubleshooting and pipeline configuration for GitHub Actions, Docker, GHCR, and self-hosted runners (both systemd-on-host and containerized via myoung34/github-runner — covers CMD-herdado-zerado, env LABELS vs RUNNER_LABELS, EPHEMERAL+restart loop, gpg --dearmor em buildkit, deploy keys per-repo unique, .env leading whitespace, intermittent 401 / upstream pool poisoning por compose run orphan, e RUNNER_REGISTRATION_TOKEN como GH secret estática = chicken-and-egg em prod).
